scripts.build:pty: bash src/native/build-pty.sh || echo 'pty-helper build skipped (terminal will use fallback)'
scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target bun --external playwright --external playwright-core --external electron --external chromium-bidi
scripts.build:binary: bun build src/index.ts --compile --external playwright --external playwright-core --external electron --external chromium-bidi --outfile ../../src-tauri/binaries/e-server
scripts.build:standalone: bun build src/standalone.ts --compile --external playwright --external playwright-core --external electron --external chromium-bidi --outfile ../../dist/standalone/e
scripts.build:golem: mkdir -p ../../dist/golem && bun build src/golem/index.ts --compile --external playwright --external playwright-core --external electron --external chromium-bidi --outfile ../../dist/golem/e-golem
